# CodeSimplr

CodeSimplr builds AI automation, workflow automation, conversion-focused websites, and SEO growth systems for service businesses across the USA, UK, Canada, UAE, India, and remote international markets. A current specialty is practical workflow automation for recruitment and staffing agencies.

## Primary Offers

- Free 3-Point Growth Audit: three practical priorities covering conversion, follow-up automation, and search visibility.
- AI Automation Agency: AI agents, lead follow-up automation, support automation, recruiter workflows, and reporting systems.
- Website Design & SEO: service pages, country pages, lead forms, blog structure, structured data, and analytics.
- n8n Workflow Automation: forms, webhooks, CRM updates, spreadsheets, email, WhatsApp, reporting, and AI workflow steps.
- Recruitment Automation: a fixed-scope 14-day pilot for candidate intake, screening support, follow-up, or reporting that keeps recruiters in control.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://codesimplr.com/
- Free audit contact page: https://codesimplr.com/contact
- AI automation agency: https://codesimplr.com/ai-automation-agency
- Website design and SEO: https://codesimplr.com/website-design-seo
- n8n workflow automation: https://codesimplr.com/n8n-workflow-automation
- Recruitment automation: https://codesimplr.com/recruitment-automation
- Recruitment automation ROI calculator: https://codesimplr.com/recruitment-automation-roi-calculator
- Recruitment automation workflow guide: https://codesimplr.com/blog/recruitment-automation-workflows-staffing-agencies
- Blog: https://codesimplr.com/blog
- USA services: https://codesimplr.com/usa
- UK services: https://codesimplr.com/uk
- Canada services: https://codesimplr.com/canada

## Backend And Analytics

Lead submissions are designed to be stored in a Neon Postgres table named `website_signups` when the Vercel project has `DATABASE_URL` and `SIGNUPS_ADMIN_TOKEN` configured. Website events are designed to be stored in `website_events`.
